ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia (Day 4 - Play in Progress)
West Indies Women vs Australia Women - 2nd ODI (Starts ~15:00 UTC)

summary: The main cricket focus today is the IPL 2026 match between Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders, starting at 14:05 UTC. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently live on Day 4, with Victoria in a strong position. The West Indies Women vs Australia Women ODI is also scheduled for later today.
